message:
test(fuzz): DataFrame constructor + merge fuzz targets (br-frankenpandas-d7lt)

Land the /testing-fuzzing Rule 3 coverage gap identified in
br-frankenpandas-d7lt: four DataFrame pub-fn surfaces that take
untrusted Vec<Scalar> / &DataFrame had no fuzz targets.

Adds fp-conformance fuzz entrypoints and libfuzzer_sys targets for:

1. fuzz_dataframe_from_dict
   - Projects raw bytes into a name→Vec<Scalar> dict with n_cols ∈
     [1, 4] and n_rows ∈ [1, 8]. On Ok, asserts row count matches
     the inferred count and column count matches `column_order`.

2. fuzz_dataframe_from_records
   - Builds rectangular records and calls from_records with explicit
     column names. On Ok, asserts row count equals the records-vec
     length (catches any silent dedupe / truncation regression).

3. fuzz_dataframe_from_series
   - Constructs a Vec<Series> sharing a single Index (the AACE
     aligned path) and calls from_series. Invariants: column count
     == series count, row count == shared index length.

4. fuzz_dataframe_merge
   - Builds two small frames with a shared "k" column + one value
     column each, drives all four join types (Inner/Left/Right/Outer)
     through merge_dataframes. Pins the cross-product upper bound
     (merged_rows ≤ left_rows * right_rows) so any cartesian
     explosion bug is caught immediately rather than exhausting
     memory mid-campaign.

Each harness caps input at 64 KiB (matching the existing fuzz
target convention) so libfuzzer mutators stay inside the parse
budget. Seeds live in fuzz/corpus/<target>/ (empty, minimal_2x3,
one_cell, three_cols_four_rows) and follow the existing
small-bytes-mutation-seed pattern proven out by the fuzz_pivot_table
/ fuzz_dataframe_op_chain targets.

fuzz/artifacts/<target>/README.md stubs mirror the existing per-
target convention (minimize into corpus with `cargo fuzz tmin`).

merge_dataframes was re-exported from fp_join alongside the
existing join_series / merge_ordered imports so the harness can
reach it through fp-conformance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -193,5 +193,33 @@ test = false
 doc = false
 bench = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_dataframe_from_dict"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_dataframe_from_dict.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_dataframe_from_records"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_dataframe_from_records.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_dataframe_from_series"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_dataframe_from_series.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_dataframe_merge"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_dataframe_merge.rs"
+test = false
+doc = false
+bench = false
+
 [workspace]
 members = ["."]

@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# fuzz_dataframe_from_dict artifacts
+
+New crashes from local or CI fuzz runs land here first.
+Minimize them with cargo fuzz tmin fuzz_dataframe_from_dict <artifact> and then promote the minimized input into fuzz/corpus/fuzz_dataframe_from_dict/.

@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# fuzz_dataframe_from_records artifacts
+
+New crashes from local or CI fuzz runs land here first.
+Minimize them with cargo fuzz tmin fuzz_dataframe_from_records <artifact> and then promote the minimized input into fuzz/corpus/fuzz_dataframe_from_records/.

@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# fuzz_dataframe_from_series artifacts
+
+New crashes from local or CI fuzz runs land here first.
+Minimize them with cargo fuzz tmin fuzz_dataframe_from_series <artifact> and then promote the minimized input into fuzz/corpus/fuzz_dataframe_from_series/.

@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+# fuzz_dataframe_merge artifacts
+
+New crashes from local or CI fuzz runs land here first.
+Minimize them with cargo fuzz tmin fuzz_dataframe_merge <artifact> and then promote the minimized input into fuzz/corpus/fuzz_dataframe_merge/.
